subcodes.first_line: O servant enraptured by the Beauty of the All-Glorious! Thy letter was received, and its contents were understood. It serveth as a glorious proof of thy conduct in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده منجذب جمال ابهی نامه ات رسید و مضمون مفهوم گردید دلیل جلیل بر سلوک در
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
